final:
module eeprom_cell (
    input [7:0] data_in,
    input rw, // read/write control signal
    output reg [7:0] data_out
);
    reg [7:0] cell_data; // internal cell_data to store data

    always @(*) begin
        if (rw) begin
            cell_data = data_in; // write data to cell_data
        end else begin
            data_out = cell_data; // read data from cell_data
        end
    end
endmodule
